title: Thelypteris rubrinervis
taxonomy: Thelypteris rubrinervis is a species of fern in the family Thelypteridaceae. It is native to Central and South America and belongs to the genus Thelypteris, which includes a wide range of species found in tropical and subtropical regions. The genus Thelypteris is a member of the order Polypodiales, which is a diverse group of ferns found worldwide. Thelypteris rubrinervis is further classified as part of the subclass Polypodiidae, a group of ferns characterized by their two distinct types of fronds. The classification of Thelypteris rubrinervis reflects its unique characteristics and evolutionary history as a member of the Thelypteridaceae family.
